hero.badge: Launch and run your US business, from anywhere
hero.description: Prolify is the <bold>all-in-one platform</bold> for international founders — LLC formation, banking, bookkeeping, taxes, compliance, and analytics in one place.

footer.tagline: Launch and run your US business from anywhere in the world. One platform, every service, zero confusion.
footer.disclaimer: Prolify provides business formation, bookkeeping, and administrative services. We are not a law firm and do not provide legal advice. We are not a licensed accounting or CPA firm and do not provide tax, audit, or accounting advice. Information provided through our platform is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, tax, or financial advice. Consult a licensed attorney, CPA, or financial advisor for your specific situation.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Prolify.
faq.a1: Prolify is an all-in-one platform that helps international founders launch and manage US businesses. We handle LLC formation, banking guidance, bookkeeping, taxes, compliance, and more — all in one place.
faq.q2: Do I need to be a US citizen to use Prolify?
faq.a2: No! Prolify is specifically built for international founders. You can form and manage a US LLC from anywhere in the world, without ever visiting the US.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of forming an LLC?
faq.a3: An LLC provides limited liability protection, pass-through taxation, credibility with US customers, access to US payment processors like Stripe and PayPal, and the ability to open a US bank account.
faq.q4: What information do I need to get started?
faq.a4: To form your LLC, you'll need your full legal name, a valid passport or government ID, a mailing address, and a company name. We guide you through every step of the process.
faq.q5: How does bookkeeping work on Prolify?
faq.a5: Prolify provides automated bookkeeping tools that track your income and expenses, generate financial reports, and prepare you for tax season — all within your dashboard.
faq.q6: Can Prolify help with US taxes?
faq.a6: Yes! Our platform includes tax preparation tools, estimated tax calculators, and access to tax professionals who specialize in international founders with US businesses.
faq.a7: Prolify provides revenue analytics, expense tracking, e-commerce integration (Shopify, Amazon), financial reporting, and business performance dashboards.
faq.cta: Ready to launch your US business?

features.title: How It Works
features.subtitle: Get your US business up and running in as little as one week.
features.step1Desc: Complete our simple online application in about 15 minutes. We'll ask for basic information about you and your business.
features.step2Desc: Our team files your LLC paperwork with the state. Most formations are completed within 1–3 business days.
features.step3Desc: We obtain your EIN (Employer Identification Number) from the IRS, typically within 1–2 business days.
features.step4Desc: Get guided through the US business banking setup process. Most clients have a business account within 3–5 business days.
features.step5Desc: Your business is live! Access our full suite of bookkeeping, compliance, and analytics tools to keep your business thriving.
